category_sources: Official SourceForge project page categorizes GNUSki as Console Games.
source_facts.description says it is an open source clone of SkiFree.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project page uses the display name GNUSki.
docs_sources: Official homepage and SourceForge project page are the best available official documentation surfaces for this small inactive game.
repo_sources: No official source-control repository URL was found; source_facts.source-archive points to an official SourceForge release archive, but archives are not source-control repositories.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge project page says it uses NCurses for graphics and is categorized as Console Games.
source_facts.description identifies it as a SkiFree clone.
